overall_selection.status_reason: HON cleared the commercial release thresholds for this market week with a score of 0.156 and medium confidence.

reasons: Price trend remains constructive: 5-day momentum is 1.8% and 20-day momentum is 6.6%.
Trend quality is supported by 100% positive sessions over the last 10 trading days and the price sitting 4.2% relative to its 20-day average.
Risk profile shows daily volatility around 0.3%, downside volatility near 0.1%, and a recent max drawdown of 0.5%.
Volume confirmation is 19.3% versus the trailing baseline, which helps separate steady breakouts from thin momentum.
Relative strength is 0.0% versus SPY over 5 days and 4.8% versus the sector ETF.
No recent relevant news passed the filter, so the news layer stayed neutral and contributed less confidence.
No recently identified relevant Marketaux articles passed the relevance and freshness filters, so the news contribution is neutral.
Technical weights were calibrated on 2303 historical symbol-weeks against 5-day excess return (IC -0.23).
Overall model score is 0.156 with medium confidence.
